motion: PR #101 "chore: T3 — BridgeManager (Godot side)" should be merged into feature/86-feature-phase-1-skeleton-tower

fixes.description: Add timeout on sync HTTPRequest nodes to prevent permanent CONNECTING hang
fixes.details: Add _sync_agents_request.timeout = 10 after line 38 and _sync_floors_request.timeout = 10 after line 42

fixes.description: Document at-least-once delivery semantics for agent_registered during reconnect
fixes.details: Add code comment in _on_agents_synced documenting that reconnect uses at-least-once delivery — consumers must handle idempotent agent_registered signals

fixes.description: Check .request() return value to detect ERR_ALREADY_IN_USE
fixes.details: Check return value of _sync_agents_request.request() and _sync_floors_request.request(); if not OK, call _on_initial_sync_failed()

fixes.description: Fix SSE fallback port from 8080 to 8081
fixes.details: Change 'var port: int = 8080' to 'var port: int = 8081' to match bridge default

fixes.description: Add max-size guard on _sse_buffer to prevent unbounded growth
fixes.details: Add buffer size check before appending; if _sse_buffer exceeds threshold (1MB), disconnect and reconnect

pr_amendments: Document at-least-once agent_registered delivery during reconnect; consumer nodes must handle idempotent registration
